# SoloMD

> A lightweight, cross-platform Markdown + plain text editor for macOS, Windows, and Linux. One file. One window. Just write.

SoloMD is a free, open-source desktop editor built with Tauri 2 + Vue 3 + CodeMirror 6. It targets users who want the speed and simplicity of a traditional notepad combined with the power of a modern Markdown editor — without the bloat of Electron-based alternatives like Obsidian or VS Code.

## Key facts

- **Name:** SoloMD
- **Tagline:** One file. One window. Just write.
- **Type:** Desktop application (not web, not mobile)
- **Platforms:** macOS (universal: Apple Silicon + Intel, notarized), Windows (x64), Linux (x64: .deb / .AppImage / .rpm)
- **License:** MIT
- **Source code:** https://github.com/zhitongblog/solomd
- **Website:** https://solomd.app
- **Latest version:** 0.1.8 (April 2026)
- **Installer size:** ~10–15 MB
- **Memory footprint:** ~80–150 MB at idle (macOS/Windows), ~160 MB (Linux WebKitGTK)
- **Tech stack:** Tauri 2 (Rust backend), Vue 3 (frontend), CodeMirror 6 (editor), markdown-it (renderer)

## One-line install

```bash
# macOS / Linux
curl -fsSL https://solomd.app/install.sh | bash

# Windows (PowerShell)
irm https://solomd.app/install.ps1 | iex
```

The install script auto-detects your OS and architecture, downloads the latest release from GitHub, and installs it. On WSL it also installs required GUI dependencies (WebKitGTK, fuse).

## Core features

- **Live Preview:** Markdown markers fade out when the cursor leaves a line; headings render at their actual size in the editor itself.
- **Vim Mode:** Full vim emulation via @replit/codemirror-vim — hjkl, modes, :w/:q, visual mode, macros.
- **8 Themes:** Light (Default), Dark (One Dark), Nord, Solarized Light, Solarized Dark, Monokai, GitHub Light, Dracula. Each theme changes the entire UI (toolbar, tabs, status bar), not just the editor.
- **Clean AI Artifacts:** One-click button to strip LLM junk (Gemini [cite_start], ChatGPT 【†source】, Perplexity [1][2], smart quotes, zero-width spaces, invisible chars).
- **One-click Copy:** Split button [Copy | ▾] — single click = copy as rich HTML (paste into WeChat/email with formatting), dropdown = HTML / Markdown / Plain Text / Image.
- **Export to Image (PNG):** Renders markdown as a styled poster image with branded footer.
- **Plain text mode:** `.txt` files open as a true plain-text editor.
- **Encoding detection:** automatic UTF-8 / UTF-16 / GBK / Big5 / Shift_JIS detection.
- **Tabs and multi-window support.**
- **File tree sidebar** with folder browsing.
- **Outline view** — headings with click-to-jump.
- **Global search** across files in a folder (ripgrep-style).
- **Command palette** (Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+K).
- **Set as default editor** — one-click button in Settings for macOS (LaunchServices), Windows (registry + Open With), Linux (xdg-mime).

## Markdown extensions supported

- KaTeX math (`$inline$` and `$$block$$`)
- Mermaid diagrams (flowcharts, sequence, gantt, etc.)
- Footnotes (`[^1]`)
- Highlight (`==text==`)
- YAML front-matter (auto-rendered as a metadata block)
- GFM task lists (`- [ ]` clickable)
- Tables, strikethrough, autolink
- Syntax highlighting in code blocks for 13 languages

## Editor power features

- Image paste from clipboard (auto-saves to `_assets/`)
- Image drag-drop from OS
- Spell check (browser-native)
- Focus mode (dim non-active lines)
- Typewriter mode (cursor stays vertically centered)
- Session restore (auto-save every 500 ms; crash recovery)
- Custom CSS theme injection

## Export targets

- HTML (newsletter-quality, brand-styled)
- PDF (includes KaTeX and Mermaid)
- Word DOCX
- PNG image (poster-style)
- Copy as rich HTML / Markdown / Plain text / Image

## Chinese-language features

- CJK word count in status bar
- Simplified ↔ Traditional Chinese conversion (OpenCC)
- Pinyin export
- Auto-detect GBK / Big5 / GB18030 encoding
- Linux Chinese font fallback (Noto Sans CJK / WenQuanYi)

## How SoloMD compares

- vs **Typora**: SoloMD is ~6× smaller (15 MB vs 70 MB), free instead of $14.99, open source. Typora has more polished WYSIWYG.
- vs **MarkText**: similar positioning; SoloMD is actively maintained, MarkText is dormant since 2023.
- vs **Obsidian**: SoloMD is 7× lighter (15 MB vs 110 MB), no vault concept, no plugin system, no knowledge graph. SoloMD targets writers, not knowledge managers.
- vs **VS Code**: SoloMD is purpose-built for Markdown writing; VS Code is a code editor that happens to render Markdown.
- vs **iA Writer**: similar minimalism, but SoloMD is free and open source.

## What SoloMD intentionally does NOT have

- No cloud sync, no accounts, no telemetry
- No knowledge graph or backlinks
- No plugin system
- No mobile app (yet)

## Download

All platforms: https://github.com/zhitongblog/solomd/releases/latest

Or use the one-line install command above.

## Author and support

- **Author:** xiangdong li (zhitong)
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/zhitongblog/solomd
- **Sponsorship:** GitHub Sponsors (international), Alipay / WeChat Pay (China) — see https://solomd.app/#sponsor
